requirements.title: Valid user can login and access dashboard
requirements.expectation: After valid credentials, user can access protected dashboard

requirements.title: Invalid login is rejected
requirements.expectation: Invalid credentials keep user on login and show error

requirements.title: User can create core record
requirements.expectation: Valid core save produces success signal

requirements.title: Created core record can be verified
requirements.expectation: Created record is available for detail/list verification

requirements.title: Unauthorized access to core list is blocked
requirements.expectation: Unauthenticated route access redirects to login

requirements.title: Post-logout access is blocked
requirements.expectation: After logout, protected routes cannot be accessed
